strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Strong distributed-systems background with event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and adopting modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or regulated-environment experience (e.g., real-time credit risk, payment flows)
No explicit mention of multi-agent AI systems in production beyond early-stage tooling
Minimal exposure to hybrid engineering governance with external partners or outsourced teams
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, agentic workflows, and engineering leadership, with evidence of scaling teams and adopting rigorous practices. However, his background lacks direct fintech or regulated-environment experience, and his agentic-AI work appears more tooling-focused than production-grade system design. His fit is promising for a technical leadership role but may require significant upskilling for the fintech regulatory and domain complexities.
